scripts.//suite-1: Runs full suite on default environment (QA) in headless mode if headless is set to true in config files
scripts.//suite-qa: Runs all tests on the QA environment using config files
scripts.//suite-dev: Runs all tests on the DEV environment using config files
scripts.//single-file-tip: Shortcut tip to execute a single test file on QA environment
scripts.//single-test-tip: Shortcut tip to execute a specific test case by its name/title on QA
scripts.//single-test-example: Usage: npm run test:qa -- -g 'user login with valid credentials'
scripts.//allure-report-generation: Generates a fresh Allure HTML report by consuming raw XML/JSON results
scripts.//allure-report-open: Hosts and opens the generated Allure HTML report on a local live server
scripts.//browser-specific-chrome: Runs full test suite on QA environment specifically inside headed Google Chrome browser
scripts.test:chrome: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test --project="Google Chrome" --headed
scripts.//browser-specific-edge: Runs full test suite on QA environment specifically inside headed Microsoft Edge browser
scripts.test:edge: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test --project="Microsoft Edge"
scripts.//browser-specific-firefox: Runs full test suite on QA environment specifically inside headed Mozilla Firefox browser
scripts.//cross-browser-multi: Runs full test suite on QA environment across multiple browsers (Chrome & Edge) parallelly
scripts.test:multi: cross-env ENV=qa npx playwright test --project="Google Chrome" --project="Microsoft Edge" --headed
scripts.//browser-specific-edge-headless: Runs full test suite on QA environment inside Microsoft Edge in headless mode (background) by overriding config settings
scripts.test:edge:headless: cross-env ENV=qa PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS=true npx playwright test --project="Microsoft Edge"
